rulings.Case Title: RICHARD CURRAN VS. CROWN CORK & SEAL COMPANY et al****TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY*****
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, OCTOBER 21, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 1. Defendant Tosco Corp.¿s motion for change of venue is granted. Plaintiff does not oppose transfer of the case to Los Angeles County. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FLOYD CZARNICK et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, OCTOBER 21, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Plaintiffs¿ request to continue the hearing on defendant Foster Wheeler LLC¿s motion for summary judgment, or in the alternative, summary adjudication is granted. The hearing is continued to November 1, 2010 at 9:30 am. Plaintiffs¿ opposition papers, if any, must be filed and served by October 25, 2010. Defendant¿s reply papers, if any, must be filed and served by October 28,2010. The papers submitted with plaintiffs¿ request show that facts essential to oppose the motion may exist. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FLOYD CZARNICK et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, OCTOBER 21, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Air & Liquid Systems¿ motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed on October 7. = (220/HEK)
